title: Gate promotion on a frozen evaluation set
description: Block any candidate model from advancing to production unless it clears a frozen offline eval and shadow-traffic check against the incumbent.
body: Use when a retrained candidate is competing to replace the incumbent serving model. Do not promote on training metrics alone — they say nothing about regression on held-out slices or live traffic. Actions: run the candidate against a frozen eval set and key segments, compare to the incumbent, then shadow live requests before cutover. Validation signals include a benchmark report showing no slice regresses past the threshold and shadow predictions tracking the incumbent within tolerance. Risk boundary: promoting a regressing model degrades every downstream decision; if any guarded slice drops, deny the gate and require human sign-off.
